resources.notes: Anchor: iterables vs iterators, iter() and next() built-ins, the iterator protocol, StopIteration, how a for loop iterates under the hood.
Generators recap: yield to stream values one at a time, lazy iterators that don't store contents in memory.
collections module: Counter (dict subclass for counting), defaultdict (factory default for missing keys), namedtuple (tuple with named fields) — intro level.

web_search_query: Python iterators iterables iter next generators yield / collections Counter defaultdict namedtuple
